name: CARCLO PLC Registered Shares LS
summary: Carclo plc is a UK-based company that manufactures fine tolerance injection molded plastic parts, primarily for the medical, automotive, and aerospace industries. Headquartered in Ossett, West Yorkshire, Carclo operates through two divisions: Carclo Technical Plastics and Carclo Air Filtration. The company provides specialist plastic products for demanding applications.
